LanguageData.RICS.CHCH.ColonistBackstory: Colonist backstories cannot be shuffled (no disabled jobs to remove).

LanguageData.RICS.CHCH.NoValidAlternatives: No other valid childhood backstories available for your pawn's race/xenotype.

LanguageData.RICS.ADCH.NoValidAlternatives: No other valid adulthood backstories available for your pawn's race/xenotype.
